channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — June 28, 2026
item.description: The United States launches new strikes against Iran, citing continued aggression against commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, prompting Iranian retaliation. Serbia's President announces his resignation, triggering early elections amid persist...

item.title: The VENCAst — June 27, 2026
item.description: From a critical escalation in the Strait of Hormuz to a landmark peace agreement between Israel and Lebanon, and from Europe's unprecedented heatwave to significant shifts in AI regulation, these are the headlines shaping our world.

item.title: The VENCAst — June 26, 2026
item.description: A seismic doublet devastates Venezuela, prompting a global humanitarian response. The U.S. Supreme Court clears the path for stricter immigration policies, while new tensions rise in the Strait of Hormuz after a cargo ship attack. Europe grapples wit...
